g.text: Autonomous API Stress & Security Intelligence Platform
🎓 Educational & Research Edition — Offensive + Defensive · Authorised testing only
FOR EDUCATION & SECURITY RESEARCH ONLY. AEGIS is a dual-use offensive + defensive API
testing platform built for students, researchers and authorised penetration testers to
learn how API load, resilience and injection-class vulnerabilities work — and how to
defend against them. Use it ONLY on systems you own or are explicitly authorised to
test. Unauthorised use is illegal and is solely the user's responsibility.
